# Orbital card constellation — generated evidence assets

Generated on 2026-07-21 with the built-in OpenAI ImageGen tool. These images depict a fictional coastal-resilience research project named **Northline / Tidal Commons**. They are original synthetic editorial evidence images, not photographs of a real place, organization, device, study, or scientific result.

The demo fetches every committed JPEG from the same origin, verifies its SHA-256 digest, decodes the real pixels, samples them for a distinct pixel fingerprint and luminance-derived gravity weight, transfers the decoded pixels into a `p5.Image`, and renders the result inside an evidence node. The files are therefore inputs to both the card visuals and orbital geometry, not decorative backgrounds.

## Processing

- Built-in ImageGen outputs were retained at their tool-provided paths listed below.
- Project copies were converted locally with macOS `sips`, JPEG quality 86, width 960 px, aspect ratio preserved.
- No generated text, logos, watermarks, or real-world factual claims are used.

## `shoreline-scan.jpg`

- ImageGen result file: `exec-a6e8f335-ea2e-49a6-bfcd-9725931cbd27.png`
- Project dimensions: 960 × 640 px
- SHA-256: `08c0aef77854afa481b5274c6907f4f8f8bd867fcabd5843388b51c1aa31a699`
- Role: field-scan evidence card; sampled luminance affects its orbital gravity weight.

Prompt:

```text
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: evidence thumbnail inside an interactive project relationship board
Primary request: an original fictional coastal-resilience research evidence photograph showing a compact field team’s modular shoreline scanning rig installed on dark basalt rocks beside calm water
Scene/backdrop: remote temperate coastline at early morning, restrained horizon and open water
Subject: low-profile tripod sensor with a translucent amber measurement plate and tidy weatherproof cables; no people
Style/medium: photorealistic editorial research photography, plausible materials and natural imperfections
Composition/framing: wide landscape crop, clear single subject slightly off-center, readable at very small thumbnail size, no critical details near edges
Lighting/mood: cool soft dawn light with one warm amber accent, quiet and precise
Color palette: slate blue, charcoal basalt, sea-glass cyan, restrained amber
Materials/textures: wet stone, brushed aluminum, matte weatherproof polymer, salt residue
Constraints: fictional project only; no text, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no brand marks; physically plausible equipment; no decorative UI overlay; landscape image
```
